subtasks.title:
Day 1 [6h]: Python Foundations
📚 Keywords & Identifiers, Statements, Indentation & Comments, Variables/Constants/Literals, Data Types
🏗️ Initialize CLI app → Store and display basic user input (name, task title)
✅ After this day, you should be able to write clean Python code with correct syntax, variables, and data types.

Day 2 [6h]: Input, Operators & Flow Control
📚 Input/Output & Import, Operators, Type Conversion, if...else
🏗️ Add task priority system (high/low) → Add conditional logic (e.g., warnings, validations)
✅ After this day, you should be able to control program flow using conditions and operators.

Day 3 [6h]: Loops & Iteration
📚 for Loop, while Loop, break & continue
🏗️ Create menu-driven CLI (loop-based system) → Allow multiple task entries and viewing
✅ After this day, you should be able to build dynamic programs using loops and control iteration flow.

Day 4 [6h]: Functions & Modularity
📚 Functions, Function Arguments, Recursion, Lambda
🏗️ Refactor project into functions → Add reusable features (add_task, view_task, delete_task)
✅ After this day, you should be able to structure programs using reusable functions and modular logic.

Day 5 [6h]: Data Structures
📚 List, Tuple, Strings, Sets, Dictionary
🏗️ Store tasks using dictionaries & lists → Add search/filter functionality
✅ After this day, you should be able to manage and manipulate structured data efficiently.

Day 6 [6h]: Files, Errors & Exceptions
📚 File I/O, Directory Management, Errors & Built-in Exceptions, Exception Handling, Custom Exceptions
🏗️ Save tasks to file (persistent storage) → Load tasks on restart → Add error-safe system (invalid input handling)
✅ After this day, you should be able to build reliable programs with file storage and robust error handling.

Day 7 [6h]: Modules, OOP & Project Structuring
📚 Modules, Packages, Namespace & Scope, Global/Local/Nonlocal, Global Keyword, OOP (Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Multiple Inheritance)
🏗️ Convert project into OOP design (Task class, Manager class) → Split into modules/files
✅ After this day, you should be able to design scalable Python applications using OOP and modular architecture.

Day 8 [6h]: Advanced Utilities & Real-World Features
📚 Iterators, Generators, RegEx, datetime, strftime(), strptime(), Numbers & Math
🏗️ Add deadlines using datetime → Add search using RegEx → Optimize iteration using generators
✅ After this day, you should be able to enhance applications with real-world features like time handling, pattern matching, and efficient data processing.

quotes.text: "success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out"
quotes.originalText: "success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out"
quotes.author: Guardian

stories.content: Applying the logic of this spark to my Python lineage: "success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out"
